expectations.text: Output file is a .md file in the outputs directory

expectations.evidence: ## Summary present at line 8 with one-paragraph overview
## Timeline present with 9 bullet entries using HH:MM format

expectations.text: Document contains a ## Root Cause section
Document contains a ## Resolution section with at least one checklist item
Document contains an ## Action Items section with at least one checklist item
expectations.evidence: ## Action Items with 5 checkboxes covering smoke test, CI lint, documentation, audit, and runbook

expectations.text: Document contains a ## Lessons Learned section
expectations.evidence: ## Lessons Learned with 3 specific lessons about local env masking, cleanup risk, and startup assertions

expectations.text: Severity field uses the defined scale (Critical, High, Medium, or Low) — not P0/P1 or other formats
expectations.evidence: **Severity**: Critical — matches the defined scale exactly

expectations.text: Root cause explains the mechanism (not just names the missing var — should mention vault_secrets removal and why .env masked it)
expectations.evidence: Root cause explains: vault_secrets() removal in a3f8b2c, why local .env masked the regression, and the trigger condition (next prod deploy)
